name: Svyokla v Tomatnom Souse
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the beets, carrots, and onions together.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the grated vegetables to the skillet and sauté for 10 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Stir in the tomato sauce, vinegar, and sugar.
5. Continue cooking over medium heat, stirring frequently, until all moisture has evaporated, approximately 20 minutes. Be sure not to let it stick or burn.
6. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
7. Refrigerate for 3-6 hours before serving.
